---
name: Design RFC
about: Propose a design or resource-model change
title: "[RFC] "
labels: ["design", "rfc"]
---

## Problem

What pain exists today (or will exist at P1+)?

## Proposal

Summary of the change (link to a `docs/design/` draft if large).

## Alternatives

What else did you consider?

## Impact

- Resource model / API?
- Data-plane hot path?
- Security / multi-tenant?

## Open questions

List decisions you need from maintainers.
